description: Italian Camorra criminal organization founded in the late 1970s by Raffaele Cutolo in Campania. It was a structured, hierarchical organization that became the strongest Camorra clan by 1981, providing a living for at least 200,000 people in the Neapolitan area. It was hostile to the Sicilian Mafia but allied with 'Ndrangheta clans. The organization was considered extinct in the late 1980s after many members were killed or imprisoned.
